name: uppercase
author: Taako
description: A Red DiscordBot cog for creating and renaming text channels with visibly uppercase names.
install_msg: uppercase loaded. Use `[p]createchannel <category> <name>` or `/createchannel`, and `[p]renamechannel <channel> <name>` or `/renamechannel`. Historical hyphenated prefix aliases remain available.
short: Create and rename visibly uppercase text channels.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any end user data.
